narrative:
Norton 4-B (precinct in Summit County) has 947 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
